raw_consumer_statement:
Car mechanic Company put in defective product. Dispute with my credit card company, they gave me credit and then debited me back without explanation.

I called, they kept giving me different information as to why Kept stalling time by telling me that were going open the account back up if I provided them supporting documents I provided what they asked for.

They kept stalling without responding to me.

I have been with credit card company since XXXX. Never had any problems
